summary: Phase 3 Admin Tournaments testing complete. Backend APIs all passing (13/13 tests). Frontend admin tournaments page working after adding _layout.tsx for Expo Router. Admin console shows 'Gestione Tornei' link for super admin users. Tournament list displays with status badges (BOZZA, ISCRIZIONI). Create tournament modal and detail views functional.

issues: data-testid attributes not rendering in DOM for some elements - using text/position-based selectors instead

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Added /app/frontend/app/admin/_layout.tsx to enable /admin/tournaments route to work properly in Expo Router
The tournaments.tsx page correctly fetches data from GET /api/tournaments?include_drafts=true for admin users
Tournament cards display proper status badges (BOZZA/ISCRIZIONI/GIRONI/KNOCKOUT/CONCLUSO)
Create tournament modal has preset buttons (8/16/32 players) that auto-configure groups and rounds
Tournament detail view shows info grid (Gironi, Passano, Giornate, Round att.) and action buttons based on status
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test tournaments prefixed with TEST_AdminPhase3_* in draft and registration status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Admin Tournaments module is complete. The _layout.tsx file was added to /app/frontend/app/admin/ to enable proper routing for /admin/tournaments. All tournament admin features work: list with drafts (include_drafts=true), create tournament (draft status), open registration, detail view with action buttons. The admin console now shows 'Gestione Tornei' link for super admin users (role=admin or superadmin).

tested_flows.backend_list_with_drafts: PASS - GET /api/tournaments?include_drafts=true returns all tournaments including drafts for admin
tested_flows.backend_create_draft: PASS - POST /api/tournaments creates tournament in draft status
tested_flows.backend_open_registration: PASS - POST /api/tournaments/{id}/open transitions draft to registration
tested_flows.admin_console_link: PASS - 'Gestione Tornei' link visible for super admin on /admin page
tested_flows.tournament_list_page: PASS - /admin/tournaments shows list with status badges (BOZZA, ISCRIZIONI)
tested_flows.tournament_detail_view: PASS - Clicking card shows detail with info grid and action buttons
tested_flows.create_modal: PASS - + button opens create modal with name input and preset buttons (8/16/32)
tested_flows.navigation: PASS - Back button returns to list, Gestione Tornei link navigates correctly
